author: abcoathup
content:
https://forkcast.org/calls/acde/239/#t=2785

Call for Glamsterdam mascot suggestions was first raised at ACDC #168 in October 2025
https://forkcast.org/calls/acdc/168/?search=mascot&timestamp=01:16:09#t=4143

If there are any questions about process, let me know.   
https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8066

> Veto Powers:
>  * The Mascot Wrestler MAY veto any candidate mascot not meeting the mascot requirements above.
>   * A rough consensus of client teams MAY veto the selected mascot, triggering fallback to the next-highest-ranked candidate mascot.
